name: Black Forest Cherry Cake
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces Canned pitted red tart cherries, drained and reserve liquid
recipeInstructions:
CAKE: Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease two 9-inch round cake pans.
In a bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt.
In a double boiler or microwave, melt chocolate over low heat.
Cool completely.
In another mixing bowl, cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition. Add melted chocolate and mix in the flour mixture. Stir in almond extract.
Pour batter into prepared pans.
Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted in center comes out clean.
Let cool in pans for 5 minutes, then transfer to wire racks to cool completely.
Cut each layer horizontally to create four layers.
FILLING AND TOPPING:
In a mixing bowl, beat whipping cream until stiff peaks form. Gradually add confectioners' sugar, beating until smooth.
Spoon 1/3 cup kirsch over one of the cake layers and spread whipped cream.
Add about one-third of the drained cherries.
Place second layer on top and repeat with remaining layers.
Spread remaining whipped cream evenly over top and sides of cake.
Using a pastry bag fitted with a star tip, pipe rosettes of whipped cream around the top edge.
Decorate with stemmed cherries and garnish the center and sides of the cake with chocolate curls (shavings from a chocolate bar using a vegetable peeler).
